sys_metadata_link.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_153465_discovert_tasker_form_views"> <x_153465_discovert_tasker_form_views action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <sys_created_by>rjoy</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2022-06-20 16:31:42</sys_created_on> <sys_id>ff35cf88db5415101e1792c5d4961996</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>2</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>rjoy</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2022-06-23 01:01:39</sys_updated_on> <u_active>true</u_active> <u_description>Change to Quick Task view and select Approval with signature Task Type at any time.</u_description> <u_display_name>Approval with Signature</u_display_name> <u_form_filter>^tasker_type=614d2f29dbb4d3003a8d6be3ca961920^u_servicenow_form_view=ff35cf88db5415101e1792c5d4961996</u_form_filter> <u_order>500</u_order> <u_servicenow_form_view>simple_task</u_servicenow_form_view> <u_tasker_type display_value="Approval with signature">614d2f29dbb4d3003a8d6be3ca961920</u_tasker_type> <u_view_type>quick_view</u_view_type> </x_153465_discovert_tasker_form_views> </record_update>
